name: bold
description: Showcasing bold flavors through dramatic close-up textures and confident plating. This mood celebrates the intensity of well-seasoned food — the charred edges, the glossy sauces, the unapologetic richness of plant-based cooking done right.

style.lighting: dramatic directional light | strong shadows for texture | spotlight on hero dish
style.color_grade: rich saturated earth tones | deep burnt orange and sienna | warm contrast
style.camera: extreme macro texture shots | medium dramatic plating | slow reveal dolly
style.composition: hero ingredient close-up | bold plating with negative space | layered texture stacks
style.props: textured ceramic plates, charred elements, glossy sauce drizzle, fresh herb sprigs, rustic linen

copy_tone: Confident and flavor-forward. Bold claims about taste. Uses strong descriptors — deep, rich, charred, caramelized. Makes the reader taste the food through words.

music.mood: confident soul-funk, bass groove, warm brass

example_prompt_fragment: Extreme close-up of a perfectly charred plant-based satay with glossy peanut sauce drizzle, dramatic directional lighting emphasizing the caramelized texture, rich burnt sienna and deep gold color grade, a single fresh herb garnish, textured dark ceramic plate, shallow depth of field, bold editorial food photography
